description: Letter in Ladino sent from Salonica to Yaʿaqov Hanoko (? חאנוקו) possibly in Monastir (modern-day Bitola, North Macedonia) where there was a large Ladino-speaking community throughout the early modern period. The name of the location of the addressee is not completely clear: (?)מנצטרי.
description_he: מכתב בLadino מ-Thessaloniki. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
